Description: Works for a general, non-expert audience by making the issue clear, relevant, and easy to use.
Rating_description_1: Highly usable for a public audience. Explains what the issue is, why it matters, and what readers can do in clear, engaging ways.
Rating_description_2: Usable for a general audience. Makes the issue clear and relevant in mostly accessible, reader-focused ways.
Rating_description_3: Generally understandable, but some sections are uneven, too dense, or not clearly focused on audience needs.
Rating_description_4: Difficult for a general audience to follow, apply, or see as relevant.
Rating_description_5: Does not function as a fact sheet for the intended non-expert audience.

Description: Selects and emphasizes the most important facts, practical relevance, and key takeaways from the longer report.
Rating_description_1: Selects highly relevant, well-prioritized content and presents key ideas with strong focus and purpose.
Rating_description_2: Includes the most important information and keeps the focus clear for readers.
Rating_description_3: Includes generally relevant information, but some material is underdeveloped, overly broad, or not well prioritized.
Rating_description_4: Uses unfocused, overloaded, or insufficient content that makes the document less effective.
Rating_description_5: Lacks clear, relevant, or sufficient content for the purpose of the fact sheet.

Description: Uses layout, visuals, and data displays to improve understanding. Includes the required visuals and integrates them effectively.
Rating_description_1: Uses highly effective visuals and layout to clarify meaning, guide attention, and strengthen usability. Visuals are expertly integrated and labeled.
Rating_description_2: Uses appropriate visuals and layout to support understanding. Includes required visuals with captions and references in the text.
Rating_description_3: Uses visuals that generally relate to the content, but one or more may be unclear, weakly integrated, or uneven in design.
Rating_description_4: Uses weak, confusing, poorly integrated, or poorly labeled visuals and/or layout choices that reduce readability.
Rating_description_5: Does not include the required visuals or uses visuals/layout that do not support meaning.

Description: Includes all required fact sheet components and follows the assignment requirements for length, sections, and documentation.
Rating_description_1: Includes all required components and follows the assignment requirements precisely, with strong control of structure and document conventions.
Rating_description_2: Includes the required components and follows the assignment requirements for structure, length, and documentation.
Rating_description_3: Meets most requirements, but one element is weak, missing, or unevenly executed.
Rating_description_4: Misses multiple required elements and/or does not follow important assignment requirements.
Rating_description_5: Does not meet the basic structural requirements for the fact sheet.

Description: Uses plain language, short sentences, helpful tone, and accessible explanations for non-expert readers.
Rating_description_1: Uses exceptionally clear, concise, audience-appropriate language throughout. Complex ideas are easy to understand.
Rating_description_2: Uses clear, readable plain language and explains ideas in accessible ways for non-expert readers.
Rating_description_3: Is generally understandable, but occasionally uses wordy, technical, vague, or less accessible phrasing.
Rating_description_4: Uses language that is frequently unclear, overly technical, too formal, or difficult for the intended audience.
Rating_description_5: Is not understandable for the intended non-expert audience.
